creator: aef@shu.smolensk.su
text:
I try to "make buildworld".
On run make in lib/csu/i386-elf i have a error:
========
cc -O2 -pipe -elf -Wall -Wno-unused -c crt1.c -o crt1.o
{standard input}: Assembler messages:
{standard input}:5: Error: Unknown pseudo-op:  `.section'
*** Error code 1
========

How-To-Repeat: On 3.0-RELEASE sources
cd lib/csu/i386-elf 
make
